titleStmt.title: SII 38.422: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 422. (A.R. No. 422 of 1912.) VAḺUVŪR, MAYAVARAM TALUK, TANJAVUR DISTRICT. On the south wall, maṇḍapa, infront of Vīraṭṭānēśvara temple.

p.hi: King: Vīra-Bokkaṇṇa uḍaiyār Year: Śaka 1324, Chithabhāṉu, Chittirai 2 = 28th March, 1402 A.D.

summary.p: Records that lands which were owned by temple in several paṟṟus in Tiruvaḻundūrnāḍu, in Eḻumuṟi-paṟṟu, were submerged on account of floods caused by the river Kāvēri, and became barren. They were lying waste and deserted for a long time. It is stated that in the current year channels were excavated, sluices were set up, lands were reclaimed and brought under cultivation. It was also decided that such lands which were brought under plough were to remit tax i.e., one-half in the first year and three-fourth of assessment from the subsequent year onwards. The same ratio was also followed in regard to the collection of taxes such as paṟṟaḍai, kaḍamai, vāśaṟudi, araśupēṟu, āyam and other taxes levied on the cultivated lands, owned by the temple, brāhmaṇas (agaram) and artisans (paṭṭaḍai). This inscription also informs us that a certain Kampaṅkuḍaiyār who reclaimed lands and settled cultivators in the villages should have the tax kaḍamai collected in his name from the same villages. Further it was also decided to levy only half of the assessment on those reclaimed lands after clearing the forests owned by artisans and army personnel (paḍaiyar), and two varāgan and two paṇam (probably land owned by the temple), as per the old custom, from the cyclic year, Bahudhanya and the same be remitted to the treasury of the temple at Tiruvaḻuvūr.
The imprecatory portion at the end warns that those who violated the (contents of the) inscription would incur the sin of brahmahatti (killing of brāhmaṇa) and govahatti (killing of cows).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śakābdam 1000 2 10 4 mel cellāniṉṟa citra
bhānuvaruṣam cittiraimātam 2tiyati śrīmaṉmahāmaṇḍa
luśvaran śrīvirapokkaṇauṭaiyar Eḻumuṟippaṟṟu tiru
eḻuntūrnāṭu vaḻuvū Aṉutāram tiruveḻuntūr peruvaḻikku kiḻakku
tiruvitikku meṟku kaṭalāṭiāṟṟukku teṟkku taṇṭal Āṟṟukku vaṭa
kku Uḷppaṭṭa paṟṟukka(ā)ḷil pala koyiṟpaṟṟu ĀkarapaṟṟukkumRead akarapaṟṟukkum sa
bhaiyāṟkkum nāṭṭāṟkkum palapaṟṟaṭaikuṭikkum Ippa(ṟ)ṟiṉ paṭai
yaṟkum na palapaṟṟu kāveriāṟu Uṭainta nāḷ mutal varampaṉṟi karampumāy
Āṟukālum tuMay be read tūrntukuntu poy neṭunāḷāka kuṭiyili pāḻāykiṭakkayil yivaru
ṣam mutalukku Āṟukālum veṭṭi tirutti taraṇaiyum vaiykka veṇ
ṭum Iṭattukku taraṇaiyum vaiyttu kuṭiyum pukaviṭukaiyil Ippaṟṟu kāṭum pā
ḻum varampum
pacānam Uḷppaṭṭa pala payirukkum vāṉpayir puṉpayir Uḷppaṭṭa pala payiṟukkum I
ṭum Upātiyum koḷḷa niṟcayitta kārpācaṉam payiṟceyyum ṉilattukku Eḻumuṟip paṟṟile
veṭṭu varicai mariyātiyil Oṉṟu pāti koḷḷakaṭavatākavum yitan Etirāmāṇṭu mutal cantrātitta
varaiyum cela kālukku Eḻumuṟipaṟṟu vuṟṟa mariyātiyil Oṉṟu mukkālāka koḷḷak kaṭavatā
kavum paṇam mutalukku kuṭimai kāṇikkai niṅkalāka paḻavari Āṇṭa mutalum putuvari pū
naṭakkayi ṟṟa mariyātiyil Oṉṟu pātiyāka mutal cantrātittavaraiyum ko
ḷḷa kaṭavatākavum kaṭamai nelluḷḷatu Uḷḷūr kālāle Uḷḷūr koṭṭattile
ṅ koḷḷak kaṭavatākavum yippaṟṟukkaḷḷil vanteṟum pala paṟṟaṭaikkum kaṭamai vācalkaṭṭu viva
vācaṟuti Aracupeṟu vācalppaṇam Āyam pulvari Uḷppaṭṭa mutalukku Ivaruṣattu ṭu Aṟṟa mariyādhi
yil Oṉṟupāti koḷḷakkaṭavatākavum Itanetirāmāṇṭu mutal cantrātittavaraikku kaṭamai vācalo O
ṭṭu villai vācaṟuti vācalppaṇam Āyam Uḷppaṭṭa mutalukku nāṭaṟṟa mariyātiyi mukkālu
m pulvarikku Oṉṟu pātiyum koḷḷakkaṭavatākavum yipaṟṟukaḷil Ivaruṣam mutalukku paātiyum
paṭaiyaṟkku makamai komaṟ k kāṇikkai Uḷppaṭṭa mutalukku nāyakka kaḷuvo
ṟṟa mariyātiyil Iyvaruṣattukku Oṉṟu pātiyum mutal cantrātitta varaiyum Oṉṟu mu
k kālumāka koḷḷak kaṭavatākavum koyiṟpaṟṟu Akarappaṟṟukkaḷil Eṟum pala paṟṟaṭai kuṭikaḷu
kkum payiṟ ceyyum nilattukkum Iymariyāti koḷḷakkaṭavatākavum kampaṅkuṭaiyār
Ippaṟṟu kāṭuveṭṭivittu pukuntu Ivarāle Ippaṟṟu kuṭiyākaiyil Ippaṟṟil Ivar kuṭimuṭṭi
payiṟc ceyvikkum Ūrkaḷukkum yivar payiṟcceyyum Ūrkaḷukkum Ivar payirc ceyvikkum
Ūrkaḷil Eṟuvikkum palapaṟṟaṭai kuṭiyuḷḷatum yivarperile vaittu kaṭamai koḷḷa ka
ṭavatu Ākavum Etirāmāṇṭu mutal cantrādityavaraiyum varuṣam toṟum varuṣamtoṟum kāṭu
tirutti payircceyyum nilattukkum vāṉpayir puṉpayirkkum pala paṟṟaṭaik kuṭikkum paṭai
yarkkum Oṉṟu pāti koḷḷakkaṭavatu Ākavum tiruvaḻuvūrkkoyil Irekaikku bahudhā
nya varuṣavarai varākaṉ Iraṇṭupoṉṉum Iraṇṭupaṇamum Irekai Āy UrRead as ūrpāḻāṉa
paṭiyāle paṇṭārattukku Ilakkamākāmal kiṭakkaiyil Iy varuṣam mūtalukkupūrvva
va mariyāta vāśalaoṭṭu Uḷppaṭa pūrvvam mariyāti varāhaṉ Iraṇṭu poṉṉum Iraṇṭu paṇa
mum Ākakkoḷḷak kaṭavatākavum Ippaṟṟil Akarapaṟṟu koyilpaṟṟukku pūrvvamaṟṟa mariyā
ti Aṭaivittu koḷḷakkaṭavatu Ākavum Intakalveṭṭukkut tāḻvu vicārittavaṉ bramma
hatti kovakatti paṇṇiṉavaṉ paṭum Ivai
tevarkaḷnāyaṉ Eḻuttu §
Digital edition of SII 38.422 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
